name: @lesto/example-mcp-ops-console
description: The flagship 'the app IS the governed MCP surface' demo: a real multi-domain Lesto ops console (services + incidents + deploys) exposed as a governed REMOTE @lesto/mcp Resource Server, behind a self-hosted OpenAuth issuer, driven by a real @modelcontextprotocol/sdk agent that runs a MULTI-STEP incident-response task across all three domains. Scope governance enforced today (sre writes / viewer refused / anon 401); roles wired for the OCP-7 per-tool policy floor.
